pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target levels remain at 17.
Spring Boot and other tools may rely on this property for feature detection or compatibility checks; mismatch can cause runtime or build issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.3.0 to 3.3.13.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.3.0 may not fully support or be optimized for JDK 21; upgrading ensures compatibility and access to bug fixes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Mail API dependency to replace or supplement legacy javax.mail.
pom.xml.why_exists: JDK 21 and Spring Boot 3.x enforce Jakarta EE namespaces; javax.mail is deprecated/removed, leading to runtime NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if code uses Jakarta APIs.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Migrate JavaMail API imports from javax.mail to jakarta.mail to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.mail does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Migrate JavaMail internet API imports from javax.mail.internet to jakarta.mail.internet.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.mail.internet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Migrate Java Activation Framework imports from javax.activation to jakarta.activation.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.activation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments.

src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.general_idea: Update inline class reference for Authenticator from javax.mail to jakarta.mail.
src/main/java/com/mycompany/mavenproject.why_exists: Compile error: class javax.mail.Authenticator does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments.
